summary: Completed testing of 'Related To' (sub-category) feature across all 3 ticket creation points. All P0 features verified working correctly - backend APIs save related_to field, frontend displays Related To dropdowns in Admin Support, public /add page, and School CRM Raise Ticket modal. Add Lead modal scrolling verified with Lead Assignment options visible at bottom.

features_verified.feature: P0: Admin Support Panel - Create Ticket with Related To field
features_verified.verification: Create Support Ticket modal shows 'Query Type (Category)' and 'Related To (Sub-category)' dropdowns. When query_type changes, related_to auto-updates to first option. Backend POST /api/support/queries/create saves related_to field correctly.

features_verified.feature: P0: Public /add page - Query form with Related To field
features_verified.verification: Query Details section (step 4) shows 'Query Type' dropdown with 'Course Information' and 'Related To' dropdown with 'Course Content'. Backend POST /api/inquiry/query saves related_to field correctly.

features_verified.feature: P0: School CRM - Raise Ticket modal with Related To field
features_verified.verification: Raise Ticket modal shows Query Type buttons (Kit Delivery Issue, Payment Query, etc.). After selecting a query type, 'Related To (Sub-category)' dropdown appears with relevant options (e.g., 'Kit Not Received' for Kit Delivery Issue). Backend POST /api/schools/{school_id}/raise-ticket saves related_to field.

features_verified.feature: P0: Support Center displays sub-category badges
features_verified.verification: Support Center page shows tickets with query_type badge (e.g., 'Demo Related') and related_to sub-category (e.g., '→ Demo Reschedule'). Verified in screenshot showing 'Demo Related → Demo Reschedule' badges.

features_verified.feature: P0: Add Lead modal scrollable with Lead Assignment visible
features_verified.verification: Add New School Lead modal uses 'flex flex-col' layout with 'overflow-y-auto flex-1' for scrolling. After scrolling to bottom, 'Lead Assignment' section is visible with 'Assign to me' and 'Let admin assign' radio buttons. Cancel and Add Lead buttons visible at bottom.

seed_data_creation: Created test tickets/queries with TEST_ prefix for backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Related To (sub-category) feature is fully implemented across all ticket creation points. RELATED_TO_OPTIONS defined in AdminSupportUnified.jsx (lines 43-130) and InquiryPage.jsx (lines 39-126). TICKET_RELATED_TO_OPTIONS defined in AdminSchoolCRM.jsx (lines 67-138). Backend endpoints save related_to field: POST /api/support/queries/create (line 5815), POST /api/inquiry/query (InquiryQuery model line 8582), POST /api/schools/{school_id}/raise-ticket (line 3534).
